final:
module hmac(
    input wire clk,
    input wire [7:0] key,
    input wire [7:0] message,
    output reg [7:0] mac
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        mac <= key ^ message; // Simple XOR for demonstration
    end
endmodule
